# Real-Time Bookstore App

A full-stack real-time bookstore where stock updates 
instantly across all browsers.

## Technologies
- Backend: Java, Spring Boot, H2 Database, WebSocket
- Frontend: React, JavaScript
- Testing: JUnit, Jest, React Testing Library
- CI/CD: GitHub Actions

## How to Run
1. Run BookstoreApplication.java in Eclipse (port 8080)
2. Run npm start in frontend folder (port 3000)
3. Open http://localhost:3000

## Features
- Real-time stock updates via WebSocket
- Concurrent purchase protection via database locking
- 12 automated tests (8 backend + 4 frontend)
